message:
feat(workflows): add HandleOnErrorCassSearch handler for cass-based error recovery (ft-2l9kn)

When an error pattern is detected in pane output (error.network, error.timeout,
error.overloaded, mux.error), this handler searches cass for similar past errors
and their resolutions. Includes 3-minute cooldown, audit trail, and 14 unit tests.

Registered in all workflow runner initialization points (CLI watch, MCP server,
workflow run command).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
